meta.title: Community Quests | Daily Page
meta.description: Join collaborative community quests and help complete shared creative goals.

overview.heading: Community Quests
overview.intro: Join a shared project, contribute to collaborative posts, and help the community reach an ambitious goal.

empty.title: No active quests yet
empty.body: The first community quests are still being prepared. Check back soon.

meta.title: {questName} | Community Quests
meta.description: Explore this community quest on Daily Page.

items.heading: Quest items
items.inProgressNote: A community member is working on this item.

empty.title: No matching items
empty.body: Try a different search or status filter.

empty.title: No approved posts yet
empty.body: This quest is waiting for its first approved contribution.

contribute.heading: Join this quest
contribute.signInPrompt: Sign in to claim an item and submit a post for review.
contribute.countPrompt: Create a new post in this quest’s default room, then develop and lock it before requesting review.
contribute.setPrompt: Choose an available quest item to claim and begin your first contribution.
contribute.closed: This quest is not accepting new contributions right now.
contribute.confirmWithdraw: Withdraw this quest submission? The post itself will remain on the site.

errors.generic: That quest action could not be completed. Please try again.
errors.blockIneligible: Before requesting review, lock the post and make sure it still meets the quest requirements.
errors.itemUnavailable: That item is no longer available to this contribution. Refresh the page and try again.
errors.createFailed: The post could not be attached to this quest. Your claim may have expired; return to the quest and try again.

meta.title: Quest Review Queue | Daily Page
meta.description: Review pending submissions for the community quests you administer.

review.heading: Quest review queue
review.intro: Review the submitted post and its history before approving it or sending it back to the contributor.
review.commentPlaceholder: Explain your decision or leave helpful revision notes.
review.commentHelp: A comment is required when requesting changes or rejecting. It is optional when approving.

empty.title: The queue is clear
empty.body: There are no pending submissions for the quests you administer.

errors.forbidden: You do not administer that quest.
errors.loadFailed: The quest review queue could not be loaded right now.
errors.actionFailed: That review decision could not be saved. Please try again.
errors.commentRequired: Please add a review comment before requesting changes or rejecting.
errors.stale: This submission or its post changed before the decision was saved. The queue will be refreshed.

leaderboard.heading: Quest leaderboard
leaderboard.intro: Contributors are ranked by approved quest posts, then by when they reached their current total.

empty.title: The leaderboard is waiting
empty.body: Contributors will appear after the first post is approved.

errors.notFound: That quest could not be found.
errors.loadFailed: The quest could not be loaded right now.
